ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation - SkyJet
ham.body:
Dear [Passenger Name],

Thank you for choosing SkyJet for your travel needs. Here are the details of your upcoming flight:

Flight: SJ1234
Departure: 30th April 2026, 08:45 AM from Delhi (DEL) to Mumbai (BOM)
Arrival: 30th April 2026, 10:15 AM
Gate: B12
Seat: 12A

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. For any changes or assistance, visit <URL>.

Safe travels and have a pleasant journey!

Best regards,
SkyJet Customer Support

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Gift Card Request - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hi Team,

This is the CEO, Rahul Mehta. I need you to purchase a $100 Amazon gift card and email me the voucher code ASAP. This is part of a new corporate incentive program and must be completed by EOD today. Delay will result in penalties.

Please click <URL> to get the voucher and send the code to me directly. Use the secure link only.

Thanks for your cooperation.

Regards,
Rahul
